description_long: This object is a modern tablet device with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a vibrant, colorful screen and a thin, uniform bezel. The back is metallic with a matte finish, displaying a prominent Apple logo in the center and a single camera lens in the top-left corner. The sides are slim and flat, with no visible buttons or ports from the provided views. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of contemporary high-end tablets. The device appears lightweight and portable, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern tablet with a large display, thin bezels, and a metallic back featuring an Apple logo and a single rear camera.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a matte metallic surface, Apple logo centered, and a single camera lens in the top-left corner.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the device's slim profile with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the large, vibrant screen with thin, uniform bezels and rounded corners.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the slim profile, similar to the left edge, with no visible buttons or ports.
attribute_screen_presence: Visible screen occupies most of the front surface, rectangular with rounded corners, nearly edge-to-edge.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin, uniform bezel around the screen, black in color, with rounded corners and a smooth finish.
attribute_brand_logo: Visible brand logo (Apple) centered on the back, medium size, black color.
attribute_camera_location: Single camera located at the top-left corner on the back.
